MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-19-575501 WITH CASE CGC-19-575456
Off Calendar Mar-06-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Shamika K. Bains, Esq. of NORTON & MELNIK, APC, T:925.718.1040, for defendant/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT JELANI ARGHANDEWAL's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S), CGC-19-575501 WITH CASE, CGC-19-575456 as follows:

Defendant Jelani Arghandewal's motion to consolidate actions for all purposes is granted. The actions regard the same traffic accident; consolidating them is efficient. No trial date has been set. CGC-19-575456 is designated the lead case.

Counsel for the defendant is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
